contactBlocking.title: Contact Blocking
contactBlocking.whyWeNeedAccessExplanation:
Accord needs to read your contacts to help you avoid awkward situations.

✅ What we do:
• Read phone numbers from your contacts
• Convert them to encrypted codes on YOUR device
• Hide matching profiles from your discovery feed

❌ What we DON'T do:
• Upload your contacts to our servers
• Store names, emails, or any personal info
• Share your contacts with anyone

🔐 Your contacts are processed locally and never leave your device in readable form. Only encrypted codes are stored for matching.
contactBlocking.permissionDeniedMessage: You can enable contacts access later in your device settings if you change your mind.
contactBlocking.permissionRequiredMessage: Please allow access to your contacts to use this feature.
contactBlocking.noContactsFoundMessage:
No contacts were found on your device. This could happen if:

• Your contacts are stored in a cloud account that's not synced
• Contacts permission was partially granted

Try syncing your contacts and try again.
contactBlocking.noPhoneNumbersMessage: Your contacts don't have any phone numbers saved. Contact blocking only works with contacts that have phone numbers.
contactBlocking.protectedMessage:
{{count}} contact(s) are now blocked from your discovery feed.

🔐 All phone numbers were encrypted on your device using SHA-256. Your contacts' privacy is fully protected.

These profiles will never appear in your feed, and they'll never know.
contactBlocking.clearContactBlocksMessage: Are you sure you want to remove all contact blocks? Profiles from your contacts will appear in discovery again.
contactBlocking.clearedMessage: All contact blocks have been removed.
contactBlocking.clearError: Failed to clear blocks. Please try again.
contactBlocking.stayPrivateSafeMessage: Avoid awkward encounters by preventing people in your contacts from appearing in your discovery feed.
contactBlocking.privacyProtectedDetails:
• Phone numbers are encrypted on YOUR device
• We never see your contacts' names or info
• Nothing is uploaded to our servers
• You can remove blocks anytime
contactBlocking.step1Text: You'll see a clear explanation of how we protect your privacy, then grant access to your contacts. We only read phone numbers—no names, emails, or other info.
contactBlocking.step2Text: Phone numbers are immediately converted to encrypted codes using SHA-256 (military-grade encryption) on YOUR device. We never see the actual numbers.
contactBlocking.step3Text: Profiles with matching phone numbers are automatically hidden from your discovery feed. They'll never know, and you'll never see each other.
contactBlocking.privacyGuaranteedText: Your contacts never leave your device in readable form. We use the same encryption technology that banks use to protect your data. Phone numbers are converted to encrypted codes instantly on your device, and only these codes are stored. We can't read your contacts, and neither can anyone else.
contactBlocking.commonQuestionsText:
• "Can Accord see my contacts?" No. We only see encrypted codes.
• "Will my contacts know?" No. This is completely invisible to them.
• "Can I undo this?" Yes. Tap "Clear All Blocks" anytime.
• "What if I add new contacts?" Tap "Update Blocked Contacts" to refresh.

countryBlocking.noCountriesBlocked:
No countries blocked yet.
Your profile is visible worldwide.
countryBlocking.howItWorksText:
When you block a country:
• Users from that country won't see your profile
• They won't appear in your discovery feed
• Existing matches are NOT affected
countryBlocking.privacyNote: Your blocked countries list is private and never shared with other users.

safetyCenter.title: Safety Center
safetyCenter.subtitle: Stay safe on Accord
safetyCenter.reportUserDesc: Report harassment, scams, or other issues
safetyCenter.blockingOptionsDesc: Block contacts, countries, or specific users
safetyCenter.meetingSafelyDesc: Tips for meeting matches in person
safetyCenter.crisisResourcesDescription: If you or someone you know is in danger, please reach out to these resources.
safetyCenter.footerText: Your safety is our top priority. If you ever feel unsafe, don't hesitate to reach out to us or the resources above.

actions.contactSupportDesc: Report safety concerns to our team

meetSafely.title: Meet Safely
meetSafely.description: Always meet in public places for the first few dates
meetSafely.expanded:
When meeting someone for the first time:

• Choose a public location like a café, restaurant, or park
• Tell a friend or family member where you're going
• Share your location with someone you trust
• Arrange your own transportation
• Stay sober and alert
• Trust your instincts - if something feels wrong, leave

protectInfo.title: Protect Your Information
protectInfo.description: Keep personal details private until you build trust
protectInfo.expanded:
Protect yourself online:

• Don't share your home address, workplace, or financial information
• Be cautious about sharing your phone number
• Avoid sharing identifying details too early
• Use Accord's in-app messaging until you're comfortable
• Never send money to someone you haven't met
• Be wary of anyone asking for financial help

verifyIdentity.title: Verify Identity
verifyIdentity.description: Use video calls before meeting in person
verifyIdentity.expanded:
Verify you're talking to a real person:

• Request a video call before meeting
• Look for verified profiles (blue checkmark)
• Be cautious of profiles with only one photo
• Watch for inconsistencies in their story
• Do a reverse image search if you're suspicious
• Report fake or suspicious profiles immediately

lgbtqSafety.title: LGBTQ+ Safety
lgbtqSafety.description: Specific safety considerations for our community
lgbtqSafety.expanded:
Staying safe as an LGBTQ+ person:

• Be selective about who knows your arrangement
• Consider privacy settings carefully
• Be aware of local laws and attitudes
• Have an exit strategy if you feel unsafe
• Connect with LGBTQ+ resources in your area
• Trust your community - we're here to support each other

legalProtection.title: Legal Protection
legalProtection.description: Consider formal agreements for lavender marriages
legalProtection.expanded:
Protect yourself legally:

• Consult an LGBTQ+-friendly family lawyer
• Consider a prenuptial agreement
• Document your arrangement in writing
• Understand immigration implications if applicable
• Know your rights regarding property and finances
• Keep agreements confidential and secure

mentalHealth.title: Mental Health
mentalHealth.description: Take care of your emotional wellbeing
mentalHealth.expanded:
Prioritize your mental health:

• Set clear boundaries and expectations
• Communicate openly and honestly
• Seek therapy or counseling if needed
• Connect with LGBTQ+ support groups
• Remember you deserve respect and kindness
• Take breaks from the app when needed

reportBlock.title: Report & Block
reportBlock.description: Use our safety tools to protect yourself
reportBlock.expanded:
Keep yourself safe on Accord:

• Block users who make you uncomfortable
• Report harassment, threats, or suspicious behavior
• We review all reports within 24 hours
• Your reports are anonymous
• Serious violations result in account termination
• Contact us directly for urgent safety concerns

privacySettings.title: Privacy Settings
privacySettings.infoBannerText: Control how others see you on Accord. Changes take effect immediately.

hideLastActive.description: Don't show when you were last active on Accord

hideDistance.title: Hide Exact Distance
hideDistance.description: Show city/country only, hide precise distance from others
hideDistance.warning: Others will see your city/country but not your exact distance. You can still filter matches by distance.

location.title: Update Location
location.description: Use GPS or search for your city to set your location

tips.title: Privacy Tips
tips.encrypted: All messages are end-to-end encrypted by default
tips.blocked: Blocked users cannot see your profile or message you
tips.namePrivacy: Your real name and contact info are never shared
tips.deleteAccount: You can delete your account and data at any time

alerts.updateError: Failed to update privacy setting. Please try again.
alerts.permissionDeniedMessage: Location permission is required to update your location. You can enable it in your device settings.
alerts.preciseLocationMessage:
Location accuracy is too low ({{accuracy}} meters). Please enable "Precise Location" for Accord in your iPhone Settings:

1. Open Settings
2. Scroll to Accord
3. Tap Location
4. Enable "Precise Location"

This ensures accurate distance calculations for matching.
alerts.locationError: Failed to update location. Please try again.

premiumPaywall.subtitleSwipes:
You've used all 5 daily likes.
Upgrade for unlimited likes!
premiumPaywall.finePrint: Subscription automatically renews unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Payment charged to your Apple or Google account. Manage in Account Settings.

features.unlimitedLikesDesc: Upgrade from 5 daily likes to unlimited
features.seeWhoLikedYouDesc: See all your likes and match instantly
features.activityCenterDesc: See who viewed your profile and more
features.advancedFiltersDesc: Filter by lifestyle, goals, and finances
features.incognitoModeDesc: Browse profiles privately without being seen
features.readReceiptsDesc: Know when your messages are read
features.typingIndicatorsDesc: See when a match is typing a message
features.superLikesDesc: Get noticed by your top matches
features.backgroundCheckDesc: Optional background checks for peace of mind (Coming Soon)

alerts.devModeMessage:
RevenueCat is not configured yet. This would activate a real subscription in production.

For testing, would you like to enable premium status in the database?
alerts.devOnlyMessage:
In production, this would process a real payment through Apple/Google.

To test premium features now:
1. Go to your database
2. Set is_premium = true for your profile
3. Restart the app
alerts.errorLoadPlans: Unable to load subscription options. Please try again.
alerts.wouldYouLikeToSubscribe: Would you like to subscribe to {{title}} for {{price}}?
alerts.purchaseFailedMessage: Unable to complete the purchase. Please check your payment method and try again.
alerts.subscriptionExistsAndroid:
You have a canceled subscription on your current Google Play account.

Options:

1. Reactivate your existing subscription in Google Play Settings

2. Use a different Google Play account: Sign out of Google Play on your device, then sign in with a different account and try again
alerts.subscriptionExistsIOS:
You have a canceled subscription on your current Apple ID.

Options:

1. Reactivate your existing subscription in App Store Settings

2. Use a different Apple ID: Sign out in Settings > [Your Name], then sign in with a different Apple ID and try again
alerts.productNotAvailable: This subscription is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
alerts.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
alerts.purchaseErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
alerts.restoreNoPurchases: We couldn't find any purchases to restore.
alerts.restoreFailed: Failed to restore purchases. Please try again.
alerts.packageNotFound: Subscription package not found. Please try again.

subscriptionSettings.title: Subscription
subscriptionSettings.developmentModeDescription: RevenueCat is disabled in development. Your subscription status is controlled by the is_premium and is_platinum flags in the database.
subscriptionSettings.developmentModeProductionNote: In production, this screen will show real subscription packages and allow users to manage their subscriptions through the App Store or Play Store.
subscriptionSettings.premiumFeaturesList:
• Unlimited likes
• See who liked you
• Access to Activity Center
• 5 Super Likes/week
• Voice messages
• Read receipts
• Advanced filters
• Rewind
subscriptionSettings.platinumFeaturesList:
• Weekly profile boost
• Background checks
• Legal resources
• Priority support
subscriptionSettings.platinumComingSoonMessage: Stay tuned! Platinum tier launching soon.
subscriptionSettings.infoTextIOS: Subscriptions are managed through your App Store account. You can cancel anytime from your account settings.
subscriptionSettings.infoTextAndroid: Subscriptions are managed through your Google Play account. You can cancel anytime from your account settings.
subscriptionSettings.unableToLoadDescription: We're having trouble loading subscription plans. This could be because:

alerts.unableToLoadMessage: Please check your internet connection and try again.
alerts.purchasesRestoredSuccess: Your purchases have been restored successfully.
alerts.noPurchasesFoundMessage: We couldn't find any purchases to restore. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
alerts.restoreFailedMessage: Failed to restore purchases. Please try again later.
alerts.developmentModeMessage:
Subscription management is handled via the database in development mode.

In production, this will open your App Store or Play Store subscription settings.
alerts.cancelWarningMessage:
If you cancel, you'll lose access to:

• Unlimited likes (back to 5/day)
• See who liked you
• Access to Activity Center
• 5 Super Likes per week
• Voice messages
• Read receipts
• Advanced discovery filters
• Rewind last swipe
• Incognito mode
• Weekly profile boost

Your features stay active until your current billing period ends.
alerts.promoCodeAndroidMessage: Promo code redemption is only available on iOS devices. On Android, you can redeem codes directly in the Google Play Store.
alerts.codeRedemptionFailed: Failed to open code redemption. Please try again.
alerts.subscriptionExistsAndroid:
You have a canceled subscription on your current Google Play account.

Options:

2. Use a different Google Play account: Sign out of Google Play on your device, then sign in with a different account and try again
alerts.subscriptionExistsIOS:
You have a canceled subscription on your current Apple ID.

Options:

1. Reactivate your existing subscription in App Store Settings

2. Use a different Apple ID: Sign out in Settings > [Your Name], then sign in with a different Apple ID and try again
alerts.purchaseFailedMessage: Failed to complete purchase. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

match.title: It's a Match! 💜

like.premiumBody: See who liked you and match instantly.
like.premiumSuperBody: They really want to connect with you!
like.freeBody: Upgrade to Premium to see who liked you and match instantly.
like.freeSuperBody: Upgrade to Premium to see who really wants to match with you.

trialExpiration.threeDaysTitle: Your free trial ends in 3 days
trialExpiration.threeDaysBody: Don't lose access to premium features! Subscribe now to keep finding your perfect match.
trialExpiration.oneDayBody: Last chance to subscribe and keep your premium features. Tap to upgrade now.
trialExpiration.todayBody: Your premium access expires tonight. Subscribe now to continue your journey to finding your perfect match.

trialEngagement.day1Body: Unlock unlimited likes, see who liked you, send Super Likes, and more. Start exploring your premium features!
trialEngagement.day3BodyWithLikes: Tap to see who they are - this is a Premium feature you can keep!
trialEngagement.day3BodyNoLikes: Keep using Premium features to stand out and get more likes.
trialEngagement.day5Title: Only 2 Days Left in Your Trial!
trialEngagement.day5BodyWithStats: You've {{highlights}}. Don't lose access to these features!
trialEngagement.day5BodyNoStats: You've been exploring premium features. Subscribe now to keep them!
trialEngagement.day6Body: Lock in 33% savings with our annual plan before your trial ends. Your connections are waiting!

swipesRefreshed.title: Your swipes are back! 🎉

reviews.readyBody: Share your experience with {{name}}. Your review helps build trust in our community.
reviews.reminderBody: Your review window for {{name}} expires soon. Don't miss out!

encryptionFix.title: Encryption Fix

goals.publicYes: Yes, we'd appear as a couple publicly

profileView.notMatchedMsg: You can only view full profiles of your matches.
profileView.mustBeMatched: You must be matched with this user to reveal photos
profileView.photosBlurredMsg: Your photos are now blurred for this match
profileView.photosRevealedMsg: Your photos are now visible to {{name}}
profileView.photoVisibilityError: Failed to update photo visibility. Please try again.
profileView.profileUnavailable: This profile is no longer available.
profileView.obsessedMsg: {{name}} will be notified that you're interested!

compatibility.locationHigh: You're both in the same area, making it easier to build a meaningful connection.
compatibility.locationMedium: You're within a reasonable distance. One or both of you may be open to meeting halfway.
compatibility.locationLow: You're further apart, but distance doesn't have to be a barrier if the connection is right.
compatibility.goalsHigh: Your marriage goals and expectations are well aligned for a compatible partnership.
compatibility.goalsMedium: You share some common goals. There may be areas to discuss and find common ground.
compatibility.goalsLow: Your goals differ in some areas, but open communication can help bridge the gap.
compatibility.lifestyleHigh: Your lifestyle preferences and daily habits are very compatible.
compatibility.lifestyleMedium: You share some lifestyle preferences. Compromise in some areas may be needed.
compatibility.lifestyleLow: Your lifestyles differ, but that can bring balance and new experiences to a partnership.
compatibility.personalityHigh: Your personalities complement each other well, suggesting great interpersonal chemistry.
compatibility.personalityMedium: You have some personality traits in common. Differences can make things interesting!
compatibility.personalityLow: Your personalities are quite different, which can lead to growth and new perspectives.
compatibility.backgroundHigh: Your cultural backgrounds and values create a strong foundation for understanding.
compatibility.backgroundMedium: You share some cultural elements. Learning about each other's backgrounds can be enriching.
compatibility.backgroundLow: Your backgrounds are quite different, offering opportunities for cultural exchange and growth.

onboardingPhotos.subtitle: Upload 2-6 photos. Your first photo will be your profile picture.
onboardingPhotos.tip4: Avoid group photos as your primary
onboardingPhotos.inappropriateContent: This photo contains inappropriate content and cannot be uploaded. Please choose a different photo.

report.title: Report {{name}}
report.subtitle: Please select the reason you're reporting this user:

reasons.blackmailDescription: Someone shared your watermarked profile screenshot
reasons.inappropriateContentDescription: Photos, bio, or messages contain inappropriate content
reasons.fakeProfileDescription: Profile appears to be fake or impersonating someone
reasons.scamDescription: Asking for money or appears to be a scam

report.evidenceInfo: Upload screenshots showing your profile with watermark visible. Look for faint text in corners showing user ID and timestamp.
report.explainHint: Please describe the specific behavior or content that violates our guidelines.
report.explainPlaceholder: What did this user do? Be specific - include dates, messages, or behavior details...
report.privacyNotice: Your report is anonymous. The reported user will not be notified.
report.permissionMessage: Please allow access to your photo library to upload evidence.
report.uploadFailedMessage: Failed to upload one or more photos. Please try again.
report.selectPhotoError: Failed to select photos. Please try again.
report.selectReasonError: Please select a reason for reporting
report.explanationRequiredMessage: Please provide a detailed explanation (at least 20 characters) of why you are reporting this user.
report.evidenceRequiredMessage: Blackmail reports require screenshot evidence. Please upload at least one photo showing the watermark.
report.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to report a user
report.submittedMessage: Thank you for helping keep Accord safe. Our moderation team will review this report.
report.submitError: Failed to submit report. Please try again.

reportAlt.title: Report {{name}}
reportAlt.subtitle: Help us keep Accord safe
reportAlt.whyReporting: Why are you reporting this profile?
reportAlt.detailsPlaceholder: Help us understand what happened (minimum 10 characters)
reportAlt.evidenceInfo: Upload screenshots showing your profile with watermark visible. This helps us identify who shared it.
reportAlt.evidenceRequiredMessage: Blackmail reports require screenshot evidence. Please upload at least one photo.
reportAlt.infoNotice: Reports are reviewed by our team. False reports may result in account suspension.

block.title: Block {{name}}?
block.deleteMessages: Permanently delete all messages (cannot be undone)
block.unblockNote: You can unblock them later in Settings → Blocked Users
block.alreadyBlockedMessage: You have already blocked this user.
block.userBlockedMessage: {{name}} has been blocked. Your conversation has been permanently deleted and they can no longer see your profile.
block.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to block a user
block.error: Failed to block user. Please try again.

blockAlt.title: Block {{name}}?
blockAlt.deleteMessages: Permanently delete all messages (cannot be undone)

unmatch.title: Unmatch with {{name}}?
unmatch.description: This will end your conversation with {{name}}. You may see each other in discovery again.
unmatch.privacy: {{name}} won't be notified that you unmatched
unmatch.errorMessage: Failed to unmatch. Please try again.

verification.tooManyAttemptsMessage: You have exceeded the maximum number of verification attempts (5). Please contact support at hello@joinaccord.app.
verification.tooManyAttemptsMessageShort: You have exceeded the maximum number of verification attempts. Please contact support.
verification.cameraPermissionMessage: Please allow camera access to take a verification selfie.
verification.selfieErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
verification.successMessage:
Your photos have been verified!

Match confidence: {{similarity}}%

Your profile now shows a verified badge.
verification.unsuccessfulMessage:
{{message}}

To improve your chances:

• Take your selfie in bright, natural daylight
• Make sure your primary profile photo is recent
• Face the camera directly
• Remove sunglasses, hats, or masks
• Avoid shadows on your face
verification.noPhotosMessage: Please upload profile photos before verifying.
verification.profileNotFound: Profile not found. Please try again.
verification.errorMessage: Verification failed. Please try again later.
verification.title: Photo Verification
verification.verifiedDescription: Your photos are verified! This shows other users that your profile pictures accurately represent you.
verification.unverifiedDescription: Verify your photos by taking a selfie. We'll compare it to your profile photos using face recognition.
verification.beforeYouStartDescription: Make sure your primary profile photo (first photo) is a recent, clear photo of your face. The selfie you take will be compared against your profile photos.
verification.unsuccessfulBannerMessage: The selfie didn't match your profile photos well enough. For best results, take your selfie in bright natural daylight and make sure your primary profile photo is a recent, clear photo of your face.

tips.daylight: Take your selfie in bright, natural daylight
tips.faceCamera: Face the camera directly with a neutral expression
tips.recentPhoto: Ensure your primary profile photo is recent and shows your face clearly
tips.removeCoverings: Remove sunglasses, hats, and face coverings
tips.avoidShadows: Avoid harsh shadows or backlit environments
tips.mustMatch: Your selfie must match the person in your profile photos

verification.verifiedBadgeMessage: Your verified badge is now showing on your profile. This helps build trust with potential matches.

banner.subtitle: Verified profiles are trusted more and seen first
